action_checkin_desc: I'm a visitor and I've just arrived
action_checkout_desc: I'm leaving and want to register my exit
legal_scroll_hint: Scroll to the bottom to continue
legal_check_rules: I have read and accept the facility access and security rules.
legal_check_rgpd: I have been informed about the processing of my personal data in accordance with the GDPR, and I accept that my data will be processed for facility access management.
legal_signature_hint: Sign with your finger or mouse
legal_both_required: You must accept both points to continue.
confirmation_exit_info: To register your exit, remember your PIN or use your ID document:
confirmation_or_dni: Or you can exit by entering your ID document at the exit screen.
confirmation_reset_msg: This screen will reset in {secs} seconds
checkout_done_msg: Thank you for your visit. See you soon!
checkout_not_found: Code not found or already used.
error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
validation_error: Please correct the errors in the form.
